_comment: Gold set for FastContext eval on the brain-agent (cctest) repo. Each query asks 'where is X' and the gold answer is the verified file + the line where the primary definition lives. line_tolerance lets a citation count as a line-hit if within +/- N lines of the true definition (FastContext cites ranges; we score File-F1 strictly and line-hit with tolerance). Verified 2026-06-26 via grep against HEAD. Difficulty: exact = named symbol findable by grep; concept = needs understanding, symbol name differs from query wording; misplaced = lives somewhere the module layout would NOT suggest (these test real retrieval value over naive grep / over a wrong mental model).

items.query: Where is the single source of truth that resolves a model name to its provider api_key, base_url and provider_name?
Where is the single decision point for GDPR/PII model selection for non-interactive background calls (scan, swap-to-local, block)?
Where are the active tools for a turn resolved (the single per-turn tool resolution function used by chat, scheduler, warmup)?
Where is the blocking RLock that serializes all MemPalace writes across the three writer daemons defined?
Where does the chat worker build the ephemeral web sources (prefetch curated Websuche URLs at turn time)?
Where is the provider concurrency queue class that caps omlx/cliproxyapi concurrency?
Where is the lossless context manager method that compacts the conversation when over budget?
Where is the function that recovers in-flight chat turns after a Brain restart?
Where is the resumable streaming replay-log class (ordered event log + subscriber queues) defined?
Where is the deterministic wire-history GDPR protection applied from the pii_decisions ledger?
Where is the warm-session-pool claim() method that hands a pre-warmed session to a bare new chat?
Where is the per-user quota manager class (daily + cycle axes) defined?
Where is the WorkflowEngine class defined?
Where is the MODEL_PROFILES speed-profile overlay that sets deferred_tool_groups to empty for a stable KV prefix?
Where is the ContextManager class defined?
